title: Name assign in claim-blocked error and add --assign-only
description:
Make claim-blocked errors actionable and add assign-without-transition.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] When `jit issue claim` fails because the issue is blocked by incomplete dependencies, the error names `jit issue assign` as the way to assign without starting work.
- [ ] `jit issue claim <id> <assignee> --assign-only` assigns the issue without transitioning its state.
